verificationSummary: Parent PR #129 is open. Issues #104, #105, and #106 are locally verified with full gates; remaining sub-issues #107-#110 are not implemented, so parent verification is not complete.

orchestrationDecisions.reason: Parent PR is missing; coordinator must seed planning artifacts, push the parent branch, and open the draft parent PR before sub-PR completion can be claimed.
Current Pi harness exposes no subagent tool; mutating worker isolation cannot be launched from this session. Issue #104 will begin locally as the critical path with separate phase evidence.
